editcheck-dialog-addref-description: Ka caawi akhristayaasha inay fahmaan halka macluumaadkani ka yimid adigoo ku daraya tixraac.
editcheck-dialog-addref-reject-irrelevan: Uma malaynayo in tixraacyadu khuseeyaan isbeddelka aan samaynayo
editcheck-dialog-addref-reject-common-kn: Macluumaadka aan ku darayo waa mid si ballaaran loo yaqaan
editcheck-dialog-addref-reject-uncertain: Ma hubo tixraaca aan ku darayo
editcheck-dialog-addref-success-notify: Waad ku mahadsan tahay inaad ku dartay xigasho!
editcheck-dialog-title: Ka hor inta aan la daabicin
editcheck-copyvio-keep-description: Fadlan ka caawi tifaftirayaasha kale ee maqaalka inay fahmaan sababta aad u rabto in qoraalka la dhajiyay la sii hayo.
editcheck-copyvio-keep-wrote: Waxaan anigu qoray qoraalkan mana lagu daabicin meel kale
editcheck-copyvio-keep-permission: Qoraalkan si xor ah ayaa loo shatiyeeyay
editcheck-copyvio-keep-other: Midkoodna kuwa kor ku xusan ma khuseeyo
editcheck-copyvio-keep-notify: Waad ku mahadsan tahay inaad la wadaagtay sababta aad u rabto in qoraalka la dhajiyay la sii hayo!
editcheck-copyvio-remove-notify: Waad ku mahadsan tahay ka qayb qaadashada ilaalinta in aqoontu si xor ah u heli karo!
tag-editcheck-reference-decline-irreleva: Tixraaca EditCheck waa la diiday maadaama uusan khusayn.
tag-editcheck-reference-decline-uncertai: EditCheck (tixraacyo) waa la diiday (aan la hubin)
